About me

I'm Medapati Preetham Venkata Sai Reddy, a passionate AI/ML Engineer with hands-on expertise in Computer Vision, Deep Learning, NLP and real-time AI systems. I build end-to-end intelligent applications using Python, TensorFlow, YOLOv8 and HuggingFace — driven by a love for applying AI to solve real-world problems in robotics, automation and intelligent systems.
